summary: Crystal‑clear soundboard capture of an electrifying Knick show highlighted by Loose Lucy, Casey Jones and a soaring Comes A Time breakout.
review: The recording delivers sweet, clean soundboard audio that conveys the high energy of this early‑90s Knickerbocker Arena performance. Reviewers repeatedly point to Loose Lucy, Casey Jones and the Comes A Time segment as show‑stopping moments, with even a beloved cover of I Fought the Law getting shout‑outs. Overall the concert is praised as a “killer” Dead show from the ’90s.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviewers give high star ratings (5, 5, 4) and focus on both excellent soundboard quality and strong musical moments, indicating a very good to great show with an excellent recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as sweet, clean and crisp; captures the band’s energy without any noted drop‑outs or muddiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High‑energy performance throughout, especially noted for an electric vibe at Knick; transitions and audience interaction praised.

band_member_comments.Drums: Drum work highlighted during the six‑gun part of I Fought the Law, receiving specific praise.
